## [00:00 - 03:00]

So the pre pre launch sequence or pre pre as I like to call is part of the heart and soul. The pre pre launch sequence is one of those the three big sequences along with the pre launch and the open cart sequence that make up PLF and so I could be getting to the pre launch next module module four but here we're going to focus on module three. So one of the absolute core principles that I it's been part of my DNA from the start I think is that you only want to sell what the market wants. It sounds so simple but so many people come up with these huge amazing plans and ideas without giving much thought to whether people really want to buy it or they'll put together plans for things that they think people should want or they think that the people should need or should care about instead of really focusing on what do they truly want and when you saw what the market wants it makes your life so much simpler. If you get around a bunch of super advanced marketers the things they tend to talk about the most is their offers and by that they mean what are they going to sell what is it that they think the market wants. So your pre pre launch that's what this module is all about it helps you create the product that your market wants it helps you refine your offer and actually how you communicate that offer through a conversation with your market and this isn't some theoretical thing you're going to see how we do this and it also helps you build buzz ahead of your launch it's a lot easier to build buzz and get word of mouth before you're in the active sales process and that's what the pre pre launch is all about. So this is the first step in an internal launch in fact it's the first step really in any kind of launch but we're going to focus here on the internal launch. It's your very very first step before you get into your PLC one PLC two PLC three and your open cart sequence. often just it's super super simple to do your pre pre so this is something that it can start four weeks out it can even start further out but let's not get crazy here since we're just introducing this to you it could be anywhere from one to four weeks you know this my last launch with product launch formula I really probably did in about five days but it's super super flexible there's a lot you can accomplish as you'll see so really these are the three big things is identify objections which is it's basically you're testing this idea out the shot across the bow and the building the buzz a shot across the bow is letting people know something is coming so with that quick super quick intro let's dive into the specifics of the pre pre launch in our next video
